notes: 6 gold videos analyzed. NEW #1: @saffyro_ 726.6K — attraction_goal archetype (female beauty + luxury context). Natural grade, no text, emoji caption.

dark_cinema.description: Near-black bg, warm isolated skin tones. @roge.editz 285.9K + @morphedmanlet 288.5K

desaturated_bw.description: Near-monochrome. @black.pill.city podcast clips, high save rate

warm_ambient.description: Party/venue lighting — warm skin under purple/pink ambient. @unc_iiris 332.8K

natural.description: Minimal grade. Daylight, natural skin tones. @saffyro_ 726.6K (TOP) + @bp.pilled 102.8K

teal_orange.description: High contrast warm/cool split. Use for transformation reveals.

none.description: No text overlay. Dominant pattern — 5/6 top performers have zero text. DEFAULT for all archetypes unless explicitly noted.

music.note: Original sounds valid — @unc_iiris used custom original on 332.8K. @saffyro_ used 'Holyy' track on 726.6K. Trending emotional/atmospheric tracks work for attraction_goal format.

descriptions.mog_edit: Cinematic edit showcasing male physical dominance. Dark grade, face closeups, no text. @roge.editz 285.9K
descriptions.social_dynamics: IRL footage showing real-world male status/behavior patterns. Warm ambient lighting, party/social settings. @unc_iiris 332.8K
descriptions.jester_contrast: Sub-type of social_dynamics. Attractive guy in low-status behavior. Caption: single ironic label + ellipsis.
descriptions.attraction_goal: Beautiful female subject in aspirational/luxury context. Serves as motivation for male looksmax audience — 'what you're working toward.' Natural grade, extreme close-up face, luxury prop (car, setting). @saffyro_ 726.6K — ALL-TIME TOP PERFORMER
descriptions.provocation: Street interview / debate bait. Short provocative claim drives comments. @bp.pilled 102.8K

caption_strategy.ellipsis_technique: Trailing '...' after single concept ('jestermaxxer...') creates ambiguity — high save/share driver
caption_strategy.editor_credit: Crediting original editor (@Sam Dezz) signals quality and drives cross-account shares

cta.text: Discipline = results. Drop your glow-up progress below.
cta.note: CTA optional for mog_edit / attraction_goal — may reduce authenticity

universal_rules: Zero text overlays = default. 5/6 top performers have no text.
Caption: 1-3 words + emoji MAX before hashtags. Ambiguity or irony > description.
Natural and dark grades dominate — bright/oversaturated = low performer.
Save rate >8% = saveable/reference content = algorithm multiplier.
Female beauty in luxury context is the #1 ceiling (726.6K). Male looksmax audience responds to aspiration.
Editor credits in caption drive cross-account discovery and shares.
Original sounds work — don't force trending audio.
